scripts.setup:api: pnpm --dir apps/cloud-api prisma:generate && pnpm --dir apps/cloud-api prisma:push && pnpm --dir apps/cloud-api prisma:seed
scripts.test: node tests/workspace.test.mjs && node tests/infrastructure.test.mjs && node tests/shared-package-consumption.test.mjs && node tests/cloud-api-runtime-format.test.mjs && node tests/prisma-seed.test.mjs
